title: Zomato Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Zomato Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Zomato Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Zomato Holdings Services:
Zomato Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Holdings Services!
